mode_selection_rationale: Pre-flight operator-directive scan returned 2 pending directives, both medium-priority with no issued_at (sort tie). Stable-sort order surfaced DIRECTIVE-007 first. Discipline is 'one directive per run' — DIRECTIVE-008 (PROP-042 authoring, a substantial design proposal) stays pending for next run. DIRECTIVE-007 is a mechanical two-task lifecycle edit (mark amendment-002 status=operator-approved; mark directive-007 status=completed), so it could complete cleanly within this run's budget.

Next non-directive run should run the full Mode 1 staleness check.
modes_checked.mode_2_infrastructure: deferred. Carried-forward finding from 2026-05-16T17-47 (disk pressure) re-measured. Project-induced footprint = 666MB; root partition 92% used (8.7G of 9.6G), down from prior 98% — improving but still above the 500MB Mode-2 warning threshold. No /tmp/*-clone or /tmp/*-clone-* directories present (no stale clones to apply the standing-empowerment cleanup against). The footprint is dominated by the FUSE workspace mount itself, which tinker cannot shrink. Recommend operator review at next checkpoint; no tinker action available.

findings.description: DIRECTIVE-20260516-007 (amendment-002-approval) completed in this run. Both tinker tasks executed: task_1 marked PROP-041-amendment-002-categories-FGH as status=operator-approved with all 5 Q-OP-A002 operator decisions inline; task_2 marked the directive itself as status=completed via the DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception. Both edits are additive (no existing fields mutated except the single status transition each, which is the documented allowed lifecycle transition). Operator has authorized operator + cowork-claude to apply Phase 2 (G+H, 8 patches + prereq) immediately when scheduled; Phase 2.1 (F, 9 patches) lands later after operator architecture audit.

DIRECTIVE-20260516-008 (PROP-042-analyst-compression-mode authoring) remains the sole pending directive after this run. It is a substantial design-proposal authoring task (7 tinker tasks: audit EXP-401 work shape, spec HNOTE trigger pattern, spec EXP compression shape, spec decider integration, spec dispatcher placement, counter-argument section, author PROP-042 as design-pending-operator-review). Should be picked up by the next tinker run (directive-override path).
